common.privacy_ssl: SSL Encryption · Data protected under GDPR
common.offline: It seems you have lost your internet connection.

appShell.subtitle: Complete your pre check-in and arrive at the hotel without waiting at reception.

checkin.error_invalid_reservation: The booking could not be identified. The link may have expired or is incorrect.

validation.future_birthdate: Date of birth cannot be in the future
validation.required_doc_support: Support number is required for DNI and NIE
validation.required_email_or_phone: Enter at least an email or phone number
validation.invalid_nie: Invalid NIE. Format: X/Y/Z + 7 digits + letter (e.g., X1234567Z)
validation.invalid_passport: Invalid passport. Must be between 6 and 15 alphanumeric characters.
validation.invalid_cif: Invalid CIF. Format: letter + 7 digits + letter/digit (e.g., A1234567B)
validation.doc_too_short: The document number seems too short
validation.missing_relationships: Missing relationships in the forms. Please review the details of all guests.
validation.duplicate_doc: This document has already been registered for another guest.
validation.city_must_be_selected: Pick a city from the suggestions list

search.subtitle: Enter your booking number to start the early check-in process
search.booking_hint: You can find your number in the booking confirmation email
search.error_not_found: No booking was found with these details.

welcome.subtitle_new: Complete your registration before arriving and avoid waiting at reception.
welcome.subtitle_known: We have your profile registered. Confirm or update your details to speed up your arrival.
welcome.companion_subtitle: Please provide the information to register this companion.
welcome.how_to_review: How would you prefer to review your details?
welcome.how_to_complete: How would you prefer to complete your registration?
welcome.how_to_companion: How would you prefer to fill in their details?
welcome.error_notice: If the number of people is incorrect or you wish to modify your booking, please contact the hotel before continuing.
welcome.question_minors: Are there any minors staying in this booking?
welcome.card_scan_sub: Take a photo of your ID or passport and we will fill in the details automatically.
welcome.card_manual_sub_new: Enter your information step by step. Fast and simple.
welcome.card_manual_sub_known: Check the details we have saved and confirm or modify them.

login.title: Hotel Staff Access
login.subtitle: Enter the reception PIN to continue.
login.error_too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

forms.minor_address_info: For registration purposes, the same address and contact details as the responsible adult will be applied. There is no need to fill them in again.
forms.name: First name
forms.adult_must_be_18: An adult must be at least 18 years old.
forms.doc_support_hint: Alphanumeric code appearing in the top right corner (DNI) or back (NIE).

scan.title: Scan document
scan.subtitle: Place your ID or passport within the frame and tap capture. The details will be filled in automatically. This step is optional — you can skip it and fill everything in manually.
scan.hint_center: Center the document in the frame
scan.upload_sub: JPG, PNG or PDF · Max 20 MB
scan.privacy_note: Scanned documents will not be stored and only necessary data will be extracted.
scan.btn_manual: I prefer to fill in the details manually
scan.error_read: We could not read the details clearly. Make sure the image has good lighting, is not blurry, and has no flash glare.

review.missing_data_title: Missing mandatory data to submit the form:
review.review_data_sub: Check that all information is correct before confirming the pre check-in.
review.extras_sub: Optional additional information for your stay.
review.requests_info: Requests are indicative. The hotel will do its best to accommodate them, although they cannot be guaranteed in advance.
review.confirm_data_only: I confirm that the details are correct.

success.subtitle_precheckin: Your details have been registered. Upon arriving at the hotel, go directly to reception to pick up your room key.
success.partial_sub: The details have been saved successfully. Share this link with the rest of the companions so they can complete their registration quickly and safely.
success.email_confirmation: You will receive a confirmation in your email

verification.title: Secure Access
verification.instruction_email: For your security, enter the email used to make the booking to verify your identity.
verification.instruction_phone: For your security, enter the last 3 digits of the phone number associated with the booking.
verification.error_message: We couldn't verify your booking. Check the main guest's last name.

ocr.err_format: Could not process the image. Use JPG or PNG.
ocr.err_size: Could not process the image. Use JPG or PNG (max 25 MB).
ocr.err_not_found: MRZ zone not detected. For ID cards, photograph the BACK (bottom strip). For passports, the photo page. No glare and with the document fully visible.
ocr.err_quality: Image quality too low to read the document. Try with better lighting.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.subtitle: An unexpected error occurred. Your data has not been lost — you can try to continue or reload the page.
errorBoundary.footer: If the problem persists, please contact the hotel reception.

minors.declare_relationship_2: with each adult in the group.
minors.legal_warning_text: Hotel establishments are required to register the kinship or guardianship relationship of minors with accompanying adults.

invalidLink.title: Invalid link
invalidLink.description: This link is invalid or has expired. Please access using the link you received in your booking confirmation.
invalidLink.help: If you need help, contact reception.

legal.title: Legal Information and Privacy
legal.intro: In accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and current regulations:

sections.p: According to Organic Law 4/2015, all guests over the age of 14 must be registered with the competent authorities.
Traveler entry register data will be kept for a period of 4 years, available to Law Enforcement Agencies.
Your data will be used exclusively for managing your stay and complying with citizen security legal obligations.

legal.footer: For more details, you can request the full document at reception.
legal.accept_check: I have read the legal information and accept the processing of my data.

huesped_intermedio.title: Data saved!
huesped_intermedio.subtitle: This guest's information has been successfully registered. Do you want to continue with the next person or save your progress and send a link for the companion to complete?

errors.connection: Could not connect to the server. Please check your connection.
errors.staff_session_expired: Reception session expired. Please log in again.
errors.guest_session_expired: Session expired. Please access again using your booking link.
